title: Settlement engine batch failure - 2nd consecutive day
impact: Regulatory breach: delayed settlements violate payment network SLA. Potential $500K fine + license risk.
mitigation: Rollback schema migration. Engage Visa/Mastercard settlement ops. All hands engineering.
blockers: {"Schema rollback in progress","DB migration lock held"}

title: PAN data found unmasked in application logs - PCI Req.3 breach
impact: PCI DSS Level 1 certification suspension. Forensic investigation required. Potential $50K-$500K fine.
mitigation: Immediate log purge initiated. PCI QSA notified. Card network disclosure within 24h required.
blockers: {"Legal hold may prevent log deletion","Forensics team engaged"}

title: Fraud model false negative rate up 340% - active losses
impact: Estimated $180K in fraudulent transactions approved per day until model fixed.
mitigation: Rolled back to fraud-model v1. Root cause analysis on feature drift. Retraining pipeline running.
blockers: {"Retraining requires 48h GPU job","Feature pipeline upstream dependency"}

title: 12 terminated employees still have active SSO access
impact: SOC2 CC6.1 failure. Potential insider threat. Access audit overdue 47 days.
mitigation: Automated deprovisioning sprint in progress. Manual review of 12 accounts by EOD.

title: TLS certificate on payment gateway expires in 12 days
impact: Payment processing outage if cert expires. Automated renewal failed silently.
mitigation: Manual renewal initiated. Cert Manager misconfiguration identified and fixed.

title: OFAC sanctions list 44 days out of date on AML service
impact: Operating with stale sanctions data violates FinCEN requirements. Regulatory examination risk.
mitigation: Automated OFAC feed parser fixed. Manual update applied. Monitoring daily refresh.

title: HSM quorum reduced to 2-of-5 - key ceremony risk
impact: Reduced HSM quorum lowers cryptographic security for card key management.
mitigation: HSM node-3 RMA in progress. Temporary quorum policy approved by CISO.

title: EU GDPR erasure workflow exceeds 30-day legal limit
impact: Non-compliant erasure timing. Potential data subject complaints to GDPR supervisory authority.
mitigation: Engineering sprint to reduce erasure time to under 30 days. Target: 15 days.
